calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ahna Girshick in Propria Persona. Scott Snibbe in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that based upon the declaration, pictures and invitation it does appear that there was a marriage ceremony. Mr. Snibbe stated that they had a marriage license issued in 2009 from San Francisco City Hall, that it was executed/signed by Reverend Victor Gabriel, Nora Reza (Witness) and Brett Bowman (Witness), and that it was sent in but lost in the mail or lost at City Hall. Ms. Girshick stated that City Hall stated that they do not keep copies of the applications for marriage licenses. The Court granted the petition to establish fact of marriage (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
